summary: Plan-only classification: #92067 remains the open canonical issue for the Telegram ingest/media-skip root cause. #92153 is an open related candidate PR for the same issue, but it is not merge-ready in this cluster because merge/fix actions are blocked by the job and the hydrated PR still has a failing native Telegram proof check plus an actionable bot-review coverage concern.

actions.reason: Best surviving issue for the shared Telegram ingest/media-skip root cause.
